title: 'Think and live in the real world': Iran reacts to Trump's 'ready for meeting' remark
summary_full: In a recent statement, Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi firmly rejected US President Donald Trump's notion of a potential meeting with Iran's Supreme Leader, deeming it impractical amidst escalating tensions. Trump, who has yet to engage with the leader in person, had expressed openness to such a dialogue.
